name: Molsidomine
description: Molsidomine is an orally active, long acting vasodilating drug. Molsidomine is metabolized in the liver to the active metabolite linsidomine. Linsidomine is an unstable compound that releases nitric oxide (NO) upon decay as the actual vasodilating compound.

interactions.name: Sildenafil
interactions.description: Molsidomine may increase the hypotensive activities of Sildenafil.
